title: A10-Derived H0 Scaffold Failure-Boundary Audit
description: Claim-bounded failure-boundary audit of an A10-derived Hubble-tension scaffold. This archive does not claim a Hubble-tension solution, Lambda-CDM replacement, observational validation, real-data likelihood result, MCMC posterior, or evidence result.
notes: Do not use a manually entered Zenodo-managed DOI. If archived, let Zenodo create the repository archive identifier from a GitHub release.
